prestazioni: Audi-sourced **4.2L V8 (engine code: EA825)** with a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone conversion, replacing the stock Bosch ME7.1.1 system for full flex-fuel (E85) compatibility and individual cylinder trims, paired with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (82mm compressor, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 1.2 bar of boost on a custom **Tial MV-R 50mm wastegate** and **Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve**

Custom **Pauter billet crankshaft** with **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** and **JE forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)** for 8,000 RPM reliability, mated to a **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch** and **Quaife ATB differential** with 3.92 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration

Full **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers** with **SPL spherical bearing front control arms** and **H&R monoball subframe bushings**, paired with **AP Racing 6-piston front (380mm) and 4-piston rear (356mm) brake calipers** on **DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors** with **Ferodo DS3000 pads**
estetica: **RML Short Wheelbase (SWB) carbon fiber widebody conversion** with **custom Spyker-specific front splitter (3D-printed in autoclave-cured prepreg carbon)** and **fixed rear wing with Gurney flap (modeled after the C8 Laviolette GT2-R aero package)**

**Bespoke interior retrim in **Bridge of Weir leather** with **Alcantara headliner** and **MOMO Prototipo Evo steering wheel (380mm, suede)** wrapped in **custom Spyker orange stitching**, paired with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified)**

**HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (19x9.5 front, 20x12 rear)** in **matt bronze finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 325/30/20 rear)**, wrapped in **custom Spyker-branded center caps** and **Brembo logo caliper covers (anodized orange)**
